2026-04-28

Data

data <- read_excel("C:\\Users\\ACER\\OneDrive\\Dokumen\\AnregData.xlsx", sheet="2025")
head(data)
## # A tibble: 6 × 8
##   Provinsi      `Luas Kebakaran Hutan` `Kendaraan Bermotor` `Kepadatan Penduduk`
##   <chr>                          <dbl>                <dbl>                <dbl>
## 1 Aceh                           8925.              2898834                   99
## 2 Sumatera Uta…                 38175.              8385863                  218
## 3 Sumatera Bar…                  8145.              3110612                  140
## 4 Riau                          21844.              5023558                   76
## 5 Jambi                          3566.              2996472                   77
## 6 Sumatera Sel…                  5940.              4606706                  103
## # ℹ 4 more variables: `Curah Hujan` <dbl>, Suhu <dbl>,
## #   `Jumlah Perusahaan Konstruksi` <dbl>, `PM 2.5` <dbl>
str(data)
## tibble [34 × 8] (S3: tbl_df/tbl/data.frame)
##  $ Provinsi                    : chr [1:34] "Aceh" "Sumatera Utara" "Sumatera Barat" "Riau" ...
##  $ Luas Kebakaran Hutan        : num [1:34] 8925 38175 8145 21844 3566 ...
##  $ Kendaraan Bermotor          : num [1:34] 2898834 8385863 3110612 5023558 2996472 ...
##  $ Kepadatan Penduduk          : num [1:34] 99 218 140 76 77 103 106 284 93 268 ...
##  $ Curah Hujan                 : num [1:34] 2839 3026 3771 3339 2852 ...
##  $ Suhu                        : num [1:34] 24.2 25.1 24.7 26.4 25.9 ...
##  $ Jumlah Perusahaan Konstruksi: num [1:34] 7099 10076 5888 7277 2884 ...
##  $ PM 2.5                      : num [1:34] 37.42 91.54 9.64 72.09 81.49 ...

Statistika Deskpritif

summary(data)
##    Provinsi         Luas Kebakaran Hutan Kendaraan Bermotor Kepadatan Penduduk
##  Length:34          Min.   :     0.0     Min.   :  203160   Min.   :   10.00  
##  Class :character   1st Qu.:   537.3     1st Qu.: 1267066   1st Qu.:   57.25  
##  Mode  :character   Median :  3552.7     Median : 2947653   Median :  104.50  
##                     Mean   : 10306.1     Mean   : 5064164   Mean   :  758.09  
##                     3rd Qu.:  9411.1     3rd Qu.: 4919345   3rd Qu.:  280.00  
##                     Max.   :118409.1     Max.   :28057560   Max.   :16155.00  
##   Curah Hujan        Suhu       Jumlah Perusahaan Konstruksi     PM 2.5     
##  Min.   :1541   Min.   :22.22   Min.   :  781                Min.   : 6.57  
##  1st Qu.:2631   1st Qu.:24.93   1st Qu.: 1786                1st Qu.:10.28  
##  Median :2972   Median :26.05   Median : 3820                Median :31.16  
##  Mean   :2937   Mean   :25.77   Mean   : 5742                Mean   :36.39  
##  3rd Qu.:3292   3rd Qu.:26.91   3rd Qu.: 7540                3rd Qu.:61.92  
##  Max.   :4084   Max.   :28.29   Max.   :24564                Max.   :91.54
data.frame(
  Mean = sapply(data[, -1], mean), 
  Median = sapply(data[, -1], median), 
  SD = sapply(data[, -1], sd), 
  Min = sapply(data[, -1], min), 
  Max = sapply(data[, -1], max) 
)
##                                      Mean      Median           SD       Min
## Luas Kebakaran Hutan         1.030612e+04    3552.730 2.131910e+04      0.00
## Kendaraan Bermotor           5.064164e+06 2947653.000 7.084238e+06 203160.00
## Kepadatan Penduduk           7.580882e+02     104.500 2.750677e+03     10.00
## Curah Hujan                  2.936666e+03    2972.225 6.225973e+02   1540.97
## Suhu                         2.576706e+01      26.045 1.493833e+00     22.22
## Jumlah Perusahaan Konstruksi 5.741706e+03    3820.000 5.408769e+03    781.00
## PM 2.5                       3.639441e+01      31.160 2.891767e+01      6.57
##                                      Max
## Luas Kebakaran Hutan           118409.10
## Kendaraan Bermotor           28057560.00
## Kepadatan Penduduk              16155.00
## Curah Hujan                      4084.10
## Suhu                               28.29
## Jumlah Perusahaan Konstruksi    24564.00
## PM 2.5                             91.54

Histogram

library(reshape2) 
library(ggplot2)
data_long <- melt(data[, -1])
## No id variables; using all as measure variables
ggplot(data_long, aes(x = value, fill = variable)) +
  geom_histogram(color = "black", bins = 10, alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(
    title = "Histogram Seluruh Variabel",
    x = "Nilai",
    y = "Frekuensi"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14) 
  )

Boxplot

library(reshape2) 
library(ggplot2)
data_long <- melt(data[, -1])
## No id variables; using all as measure variables
ggplot(data_long, aes(x = variable, y = value, fill = variable)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set3") +
  labs(
    title = "Boxplot Seluruh Variabel",
    x = "Variabel",
    y = "Nilai"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )

Scatter Plot

library(reshape2) 
library(ggplot2)
data_long <- melt(data[, -1], id.vars = "PM 2.5")
ggplot(data_long, aes(x = value, y = `PM 2.5`)) +
  geom_point(color = "#3949AB", alpha = 0.7, size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "#E53935", se = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free") +
  labs(title = "Hubungan Variabel Prediktor dengan PM 2.5",
       x = "Variabel Prediktor",
       y = "PM 2.5") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

Matriks Korelasi

cor_matrix <- cor(data[, -1])  # Gapake variabel Provinsi
cor_matrix
##                              Luas Kebakaran Hutan Kendaraan Bermotor
## Luas Kebakaran Hutan                   1.00000000       -0.086126269
## Kendaraan Bermotor                    -0.08612627        1.000000000
## Kepadatan Penduduk                    -0.10838242        0.285851599
## Curah Hujan                           -0.35636305        0.001678809
## Suhu                                   0.15060614        0.095103849
## Jumlah Perusahaan Konstruksi           0.06668257        0.913542149
## PM 2.5                                 0.12314442        0.260123903
##                              Kepadatan Penduduk  Curah Hujan        Suhu
## Luas Kebakaran Hutan               -0.108382423 -0.356363046  0.15060614
## Kendaraan Bermotor                  0.285851599  0.001678809  0.09510385
## Kepadatan Penduduk                  1.000000000 -0.003939789  0.23170866
## Curah Hujan                        -0.003939789  1.000000000 -0.08003989
## Suhu                                0.231708664 -0.080039893  1.00000000
## Jumlah Perusahaan Konstruksi        0.315708563 -0.025633955  0.02452132
## PM 2.5                              0.341535918  0.144494852 -0.12548902
##                              Jumlah Perusahaan Konstruksi     PM 2.5
## Luas Kebakaran Hutan                           0.06668257  0.1231444
## Kendaraan Bermotor                             0.91354215  0.2601239
## Kepadatan Penduduk                             0.31570856  0.3415359
## Curah Hujan                                   -0.02563396  0.1444949
## Suhu                                           0.02452132 -0.1254890
## Jumlah Perusahaan Konstruksi                   1.00000000  0.3381743
## PM 2.5                                         0.33817432  1.0000000
corrplot(cor_matrix,
         method = "color",
         type = "upper",
         addCoef.col = "black",
         tl.col = "black",
         col = colorRampPalette(c("#D32F2F", "white", "#1976D2"))(200),
         number.cex = 0.7)

Model

model <- lm(`PM 2.5` ~ `Luas Kebakaran Hutan` + `Kendaraan Bermotor` + 
            `Kepadatan Penduduk` + `Curah Hujan` + Suhu + `Jumlah Perusahaan Konstruksi`, data=data)
summary(model)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = `PM 2.5` ~ `Luas Kebakaran Hutan` + `Kendaraan Bermotor` + 
##     `Kepadatan Penduduk` + `Curah Hujan` + Suhu + `Jumlah Perusahaan Konstruksi`, 
##     data = data)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -39.153 -16.866  -3.334   8.974  54.986 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                                  Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)  
## (Intercept)                     1.103e+02  9.199e+01   1.199   0.2409  
## `Luas Kebakaran Hutan`          3.611e-04  2.660e-04   1.358   0.1858  
## `Kendaraan Bermotor`            6.800e-08  1.826e-06   0.037   0.9706  
## `Kepadatan Penduduk`            3.752e-03  1.899e-03   1.976   0.0584 .
## `Curah Hujan`                   1.054e-02  8.093e-03   1.303   0.2036  
## Suhu                           -4.582e+00  3.425e+00  -1.338   0.1921  
## `Jumlah Perusahaan Konstruksi`  1.091e-03  2.430e-03   0.449   0.6569  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 26.93 on 27 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.2906, Adjusted R-squared:  0.1329 
## F-statistic: 1.843 on 6 and 27 DF,  p-value: 0.1281

Uji Kenormalan Residual

shapiro.test(residuals(model))
## 
##  Shapiro-Wilk normality test
## 
## data:  residuals(model)
## W = 0.95044, p-value = 0.1266
qqnorm(residuals(model))
qqline(residuals(model), col = "red")

Homoskedastisitas

library(lmtest)
bptest(model)
## 
##  studentized Breusch-Pagan test
## 
## data:  model
## BP = 6.6798, df = 6, p-value = 0.3515

Independensi Residual

dwtest(model)
## 
##  Durbin-Watson test
## 
## data:  model
## DW = 1.6804, p-value = 0.1198
## alternative hypothesis: true autocorrelation is greater than 0

Multikolinearitas

library(car)
vif(model)
##         `Luas Kebakaran Hutan`           `Kendaraan Bermotor` 
##                       1.463281                       7.619871 
##           `Kepadatan Penduduk`                  `Curah Hujan` 
##                       1.241511                       1.155563 
##                           Suhu `Jumlah Perusahaan Konstruksi` 
##                       1.191509                       7.862833

Outlier

rstudent(model)
##           1           2           3           4           5           6 
## -0.12991564  1.55887985 -1.51438612  1.20554859  2.24292559  1.79193086 
##           7           8           9          10          11          12 
##  0.36803063  0.31793252 -0.17276695 -0.74147611  0.15528306 -2.19102327 
##          13          14          15          16          17          18 
##  1.85539778  1.17780508 -1.23981629 -0.56208775 -0.05047180 -0.13186499 
##          19          20          21          22          23          24 
## -1.49531625  0.32497557  0.08232383  1.18067802 -0.13829302  0.02278703 
##          25          26          27          28          29          30 
## -0.08138142 -0.67194154  0.99450534 -0.60785660 -0.27988294 -1.12236017 
##          31          32          33          34 
## -0.84748852 -0.30449099 -0.85683631 -1.55749999
plot(model, which = 1)

Leverage

hatvalues(model)
##          1          2          3          4          5          6          7 
## 0.11421152 0.12156737 0.11341108 0.08183407 0.04740365 0.04752198 0.17537638 
##          8          9         10         11         12         13         14 
## 0.05682130 0.13700844 0.25597233 0.99282766 0.49762067 0.25108399 0.22744359 
##         15         16         17         18         19         20         21 
## 0.47575111 0.07911540 0.18243884 0.16083033 0.84028887 0.17809093 0.06918445 
##         22         23         24         25         26         27         28 
## 0.04147558 0.10145060 0.16506241 0.11221585 0.11032298 0.34012706 0.11074347 
##         29         30         31         32         33         34 
## 0.09155345 0.36958363 0.09543267 0.13006218 0.06831991 0.15784621
plot(model, which = 5)
## Warning in sqrt(crit * p * (1 - hh)/hh): NaNs produced
## Warning in sqrt(crit * p * (1 - hh)/hh): NaNs produced

n <- nrow(data)
2 * (5 + 1) / n
## [1] 0.3529412

Cook’s Distance

cooks.distance(model)
##            1            2            3            4            5            6 
## 3.226364e-04 4.562691e-02 3.999333e-02 1.819922e-02 3.111763e-02 2.115442e-02 
##            7            8            9           10           11           12 
## 4.251274e-03 8.999002e-04 7.021925e-04 2.747913e-02 4.947103e-01 5.954803e-01 
##           13           14           15           16           17           18 
## 1.511997e-01 5.751857e-02 1.953907e-01 3.978422e-03 8.432270e-05 4.940594e-04 
##           19           20           21           22           23           24 
## 1.607025e+00 3.381048e-03 7.470939e-05 8.493028e-03 3.201004e-04 1.522837e-05 
##           25           26           27           28           29           30 
## 1.241593e-04 8.164168e-03 7.285735e-02 6.730655e-03 1.167654e-03 1.044948e-01 
##           31           32           33           34 
## 1.093910e-02 2.049076e-03 7.767393e-03 6.169526e-02
plot(model, which = 4)
